docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR CROSS-COMPLAINT JOSE GONZALES & AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT GUILLERMO AKA WETLAW VILLAGOMEZ, $3000. & $15. IN COURT COST.
CROSS-COMPLAINT'S CROSS CLAIM (#724132) CONSOLIDAT ED WITH THIS ACTION AND THUS NO APPEARANCE REQUIRE BY EITHER PARTY ON JAN 6, 1993.JUDGMENT ON CROSS-
